Brôkhyr Iron-master.name: Brôkhyr Iron-master
Brôkhyr Iron-master.equipped_with: A Brôkhyr Iron-master is equipped with: Gravitic concussion grenades; Graviton hammer.

option_groups.header: One Brôkhyr Iron-master per army can be upgraded to a Brôkhyr Forge-master for +15pts.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Steady Advance, Void armor

Brôkhyr’s Guild: At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a wound or armor penetration roll.
Brôkhyr Forge-master: A Brôkhyr Forge-master may use Brôkhyr’s Guild twice.
Companions: E-COGs do not prevent a Brôkhyr Iron-master from joining another unit and do not count towards passenger capacity in a transport.
E-COG support: Add +1 to every Brôkhyr's Guild roll for each E-COG in the unit.

Grimnyr.name: Grimnyr
Grimnyr.equipped_with:
A Grimnyr is equipped with: Gravitic concussion grenades.
Each CORV is equipped with: Autoch-pattern bolter.

option_groups.header: One Grimnyr per army can be upgraded to an Ancient Grimnyr for +15 points.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Steady Advance, Void armor
Ancient Grimnyr: The model can cast and deny 1 additional power per battle round.
Companions: CORVs do not prevent a Grimnyr from joining another unit and do not count towards passenger capacity in a transport.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Kâhl.name: Kâhl
Kâhl.equipped_with: A Kâhl is a character model and equipped with: Gravitic concussion grenades.

option_groups.header: One Kâhl per army can be upgraded to a High Kâhl for +15 points.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Infantry, Steady Advance, Void armor
Grim Efficiency: When activating this unit, select one enemy unit on the battlefield. It gains a Judgement token.
High Kâhl: The model can use "Grim Efficiency" twice per battle round.

Hearthkyn Warriors.name: Hearthkyn Warriors
Hearthkyn Warriors.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Autoch-pattern bolter; Autoch-pattern bolt pistol; Gravitic concussion grenade.

option_groups.header: For every 10 models, two Hearthkyn Warriors may swap their Autoch-pattern bolter
Up to 3 different Hearthkyn Warriors may take one of the following
All remaining models in the unit may have their Autoch-pattern bolter swapped
One model may be upgraded to a Theyn for +5pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Steady Advance, Void armor
Medipack: The model gains the "Narthecium" ability.
Multiwave comms array: The unit may use the Ld value of a friendly Kâhl, if any is present and alive in the army.
Pan spectral scanner: All weapons of the unit gain +1 AP when shooting at targets that benefit from cover.

Ironkin Steeljacks.name: Ironkin Steeljacks
Ironkin Steeljacks.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Autoch-pattern bolt pistol; Plasma sword.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap their Plasma sword
One model may be upgraded to a Theyn for +10pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Steady Advance, Unyielding, Void armor

Arkanyst Evaluator.name: Arkanyst Evaluator
Arkanyst Evaluator.equipped_with: An Arkanys Evaluator is equipped with: Gravitic concussion grenades; Transmatter inverter.
abilities: Command squad, Eye of the Ancestors, Infantry, Steady Advance, Void armor
Advisor: For every HQ selection, one Arkanyst Evaluator may be selected without taking up an Elite slot.
Ressource Transmutation: The model and its attached unit gain "Deflagrate(5+)" for all ranged weapons.

Cthonian Beserks.name: Cthonian Beserks
Cthonian Beserks.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Heavy plasma axe.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap their Heavy plasma axe
For every 5 models, two Cthonian Beserk may swap their Heavy plasma axe

abilities: Berserk(5+), Eye of the Ancestors, Steady Advance, Void armor
Cyberstimms: The unit can still fight in close combat even if models have already been eliminated by their initiative step.

Einhyr Champion.name: Einhyr Champion
Einhyr Champion.equipped_with: An Einhyr Champion is equipped with: Exo-armor; Gravitic concussion grenades.

option_groups.header: For every unit of Einhyr Hearthguard taken in an Elite slot, a single Einhyr Champion may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.

abilities: Command Squad, Eye of the Ancestors, Massive(1), Steady Advance, Unyielding, Void armor
Exemplar of the Einhyr: This model and its attached unit gain Frenzy(2).
Exo-armor: This model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Honor or Death: At the start of this model's activation, if an enemy HQ or Character is within 12", its placed Order is converted to Charge. The Einhyr Champion and its attached unit must use the Order to engage in close combat with the enemy HQ or character model.

Einhyr Hearthguard.name: Einhyr Hearthguard
Einhyr Hearthguard.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Exo armor; Gravitic concussion grenades; Plasma blade gauntlet; Volkanite disintegrator.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap their Plasma blade gauntlet
Each model may swap their Volkanite disintegrator
All models in the unit may take a crest

abilities: Bodyguard, Eye of the Ancestors, Massive(1), Steady Advance, Unyielding, Void armor
Exo-armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Teleportation crest: The model gains the "Deep Strike" ability. Limit one crest per model.
Weavefield crest: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model.

Hernkyn Yaegirs.name: Hernkyn Yaegirs
Hernkyn Yaegirs.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt shotgun; Gravitic concussion grenades.

option_groups.header: For every 5 models, two Hernkyn Pioneers may swap their Bolt shotgun
All remaining models may swap their Bolt shotguns
One model may be upgraded to a Theyn for +5pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Infiltrator, Steady Advance, Use cover, Void armor
Hernkyn Yaegirs.unit_type: Infantry, Sniper: Models with a Magna-coil rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.

Memnyr Strategist.name: Memnyr Strategist
Memnyr Strategist.equipped_with: A Memnyr Strategist is equipped with: Gravitic concussion grenades.
abilities: Command squad, Eye of the Ancestors, Infantry, Steady Advance, Void armor
Advisor: For every HQ selection, one Memnyr Strategist may be selected without taking up an Elite slot.
Computational Mastermind: While the model is on the battlefield, you may change a friendly unit's order to any other order when that unit gets activated.
Predictive Guidance: The model and its attached unit do not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.

Hernkyn Pioneers.name: Hernkyn Pioneers
Hernkyn Pioneers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt revolver; Gravitic concussion grenades; Magna-coil autocannon.

option_groups.header: For every 3 models, one Hernkyn Pioneer may be equipped with
The whole unit may take one of these upgrades
One model may be upgraded to a Theyn for +5pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Void armor
Weapon crew kin: Any model with a HYLas rotary cannon or Ion beamer gains +1 Wound and +1 Attack.
Upgrades:
Multiwave comms array: The unit may use the Ld value of a friendly Kâhl, if any is present and alive in the army.
Pan spectral scanner: All weapons of the unit gain "Sunder(1)".
Rollbar searchlight: The unit ignores the -1 to hit modifier for cover.

Kapricus Defender.name: Kapricus Defender
Kapricus Defender.equipped_with: A Kapricus Defender is equipped with: HYLas rotary cannon; Twin magna-coil autocannon.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap their HYLas rotary cannon

abilities: Anti-grav, Eye of the Ancestors, Squadron, Vanguard, Void armor
Scanner Uplinks: All ranged weapons of the model gain the "Suppression" ability.

Brôkhyr Thunderkyn.name: Brôkhyr Thunderkyn
Brôkhyr Thunderkyn.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt cannon; Omni-visor.

option_groups.header: All models may swap their Bolt cannon

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Massive(1), Steady Advance, Void armor
Omni-visors: The model ignores the -1 to hit modifier for cover.

Cthonian Earthshakers.name: Cthonian Earthshakers
Cthonian Earthshakers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Autoch-pattern bolt pistol; Plasma pick; Tremor shells.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap their Tremor shells

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Squadron, Steady Advance, Void armor
Support Weapons crew: Every instance of damage can only ever cause 1 wound loss. Attacks with the "Barrage" or "Explosive" ability cause one hit for each Wound remaining on the model.

Hekaton Land Fortress.name: Hekaton Land Fortress
Hekaton Land Fortress.equipped_with: A Hekaton Land Fortress is a single model and equipped with: MATR autocannon; Pan spectral scanner; SP heavy conversion beamer; 2 Twin bolt cannons.

option_groups.header: Can replace the SP heavy conversion beamer
Can replace each Twin bolt cannon
Can replace the Pan spectral scanner

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Void armor
Pan spectral scanner: All weapons of the unit gain +1 AP when shooting at targets that benefit from cover.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models.

Kapricus Carrier.name: Kapricus Carrier
Kapricus Carrier.equipped_with: A Kapricus Carrier is equipped with: Magna-coil autocannon; Twin magna-coil autocannon.
abilities: Anti-grav, Eye of the Ancestors, Void armor
Scanner Uplinks: All ranged weapons of the model gain the "Suppression" ability.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 5 infantry models, excluding models in Exo-armor and Exo-frames.

Sagitaur.name: Sagitaur
Sagitaur.equipped_with: A Sagitaur is equipped with: L7 missile launcher; twin bolt cannon.

option_groups.header: Can replace the L7 missile launcher

abilities: Eye of the Ancestors, Void armor
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 6 infantry models, excluding models in Exo-armor and Exo-frames.

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Can only be used with a Charge order

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(3), Can only be used with a Charge order

equipment.name: Ancestor relicᴱ
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Bastium void armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Darkstar alloyᴱ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains Deadly(5+).

equipment.name: Quake Multigeneratorᴱ
equipment.desc: One ranged weapon of the model gains Suppression.

equipment.name: Exo-armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, 2+ armor save, 5+ invulnerable save, and the abilities "Massive(1)," "Shock Troops," and "Unyielding." Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Forgewrought armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Forgewrought weaponᴱ
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Marksman honoursᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Mass driver acceleratorsᴱ
equipment.desc: After finishing a charge move, the enemy unit suffers one automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for every friendly model that made it into base contact.

equipment.name: Psychic trainingᴱ
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: RAM shieldᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains "Parry".

equipment.name: Rampart crest
equipment.desc: The model and its accompanied unit gain a 5+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model.

equipment.name: Skimmer bike
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a Magna-coil autogun, the ability "Jet bike" and "Vanguard". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Swordsman honoursᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleportation crestᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deep Strike" ability. Limit one crest per model.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beaconᴱ
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophyᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Wayfarer's graceᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains "Regeneration(1)". Unique.

equipment.name: Weavefield crest
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model.

equipment.name: Weavefield crest (Exo)ᴱ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model. Exo-armor only.

equipment.name: Accelerated engine
equipment.desc: Instead of shooting, the model can use its accelerated engine and can move aditionally 3". The vehicle has to pass a dangerous terrain test.

equipment.name: Additional void armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Ancestor’s jugdement warhead
equipment.desc: The model gains an Ancestor's judgement warhead.

equipment.name: Improved targeting scanner
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons for all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Refined power cores
equipment.desc: The model gains +2" Movement.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

weapons.name: Just Bladeᴱ
weapons.abilities: Shield breaker(-2). Unique. Kronus Hegemony only.

equipment.name: Abiding Mantle
equipment.desc: This model and any E-COGs or CORVs accompanying it gain the "Stealth" ability. Unique. Urani-Surtr Regulates only.

equipment.name: CORV Duasᴱ
equipment.desc: As long as this model is accompanied by at least one CORV, it gets a +1 to deny psychic powers and can deny 1 additional psychic power per battle round. Unique. Psyker only. Trans-Hyperian Alliance only,.

equipment.name: Korvyk's Cuirass
equipment.desc: This model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Enemy attacks reduce their AT and AP value by an additional -1, to a minimum of 0 each. Greater Thurian League only.

equipment.name: Last Crest of Jalukᴱ
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated. Unique. Ymyr Conglomerate only.
• 1,2 - Remove the model.
• 3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
• 5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds.

archetypes.name: Demiurg
archetypes.desc:
- This army and the Tau consider each other Battle Brothers (Green allies).
- This army must either take an Allied Tau detachment, or be an Allied detachment to a Tau primary army.

archetypes.name: Einhyr Guard
archetypes.desc:
- Einhyr Hearthguard can be taken as Troops.
- A Kâhl or High Kâhl must be taken as a HQ selection.
- Hearthkyn Warriors become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Hearthfyre Arsenal
archetypes.desc:
- For every 500 points of game size, a single Brokhyr Iron-master may be included in the army that does not take up an HQ slot.                                                                                        
- Hearthkyn Warriors do not count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Persecution Prospect
archetypes.desc:
- Hernkyn Yaegirs can be taken as Troops. 
- All units without Infiltrate or with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units without Infiltrate that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: League of Explorers
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Trans-Hyperain Alliance armory.

legacies.name: League of Leagues
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Greater Thurian League armory.

legacies.name: League of Magnates
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Ymir Conglomerate armory.

legacies.name: League of Sentinels
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Urani-Surtr Regulates armory.

legacies.name: League of Warriors
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Kronus Hegemony armory.

traits.name: Brutal Efficiency
traits.desc: The unit's weapons gain "Deflagrate(5+)" against targets with one or more Judgement tokens.

traits.name: Dour Survivalists
traits.desc: After this unit resolves a "Stand & Shoot" order, it can't receive any Battleshock tokens until its next activation.

traits.name: Frontier Momentum
traits.desc: The unit is able to use the "Advance" command.

traits.name: Fury from the Delve
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deep strike" ability.

traits.name: Grudgebearers
traits.desc: During each Command phase, all enemy units that are currently holding a mission objective receive a Judgement token.

traits.name: Honor in Toil
traits.desc: If this unit is at or below half its starting strength or has suffered at least two Permanent or Structural damage results, add +1 to all its hit rolls.

traits.name: HUNTR's Mark
traits.desc: Vehicles can fire one additional weapon if they move more than 6" and up to 12".

traits.name: Ironskein
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one save per battle round.

traits.name: Martial Cloneskeins
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Master Salvagers
traits.desc: Vehicles can use the "Brokhyr's Guild" ability (See Brokhyr Iron-master) on themselves, but only for repairs.

traits.name: Pan-Spectral Visualizers
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Quick to Judge
traits.desc: When this unit removes one or more models, or suffers Permanent or Structural damage, roll 1D6. On a 4+, the attacking enemy unit gains one Judgement token.

traits.name: Trivärg Cyber Implants
traits.desc: If the unit disembarked from a transport this round, all of its weapons gain the "Armor piercing(5+)" ability for this activation.

traits.name: Vengeful
traits.desc: When this unit is removed from the game, place two Judgement tokens next to the enemy unit that caused the last wound instead of one.

traits.name: Voidship Specialists
traits.desc: The unit does not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.

Skeinwrought discipline.name: Ancestral Wrath
Skeinwrought discipline.effect: Remove all Judgement tokens from the target. For each token, units receive one automatic wound or penetrating hit with S:8 AP:-2 D:2, AT(1), Seeking.

Skeinwrought discipline.name: Grudgepyre
Skeinwrought discipline.effect: The target unit receives 3 hits +1 for each Judgement token on the target unit. The hits are resolved with S:5 AP:-2 D:1, Seeking.

Skeinwrought discipline.name: Interface Echo
Skeinwrought discipline.effect: The target may change the result of a single die roll to any result during their own activation.

Skeinwrought discipline.name: Fortify
Skeinwrought discipline.effect: The target gains +1 Toughness and the "Berserk(5+)" ability.

Skeinwrought discipline.name: Crushing Contempt
Skeinwrought discipline.effect: The target loses its ability to hold objectives and suffers a penalty of -1 on hit rolls.

Skeinwrought discipline.name: Null Vortex
Skeinwrought discipline.effect: Attacks against the target unit gain the (cumulative) Shieldbreaker(-1) ability. If that unit has two Judgement tokens, attacks gain (cumulative) Shieldbreaker(-2) instead.
